metadata.title: National Identity Verification Portal
metadata.description: Secure identity verification and KYC compliance portal - Government of India

hero.headline: Delivering Identity Verification to citizens in a timely, accessible and reliable manner
hero.description: A secure platform for identity verification, document validation, and application tracking.

checkStatus.title: Check Application Status
checkStatus.description: Track the progress of your application

registerFeedback.title: Register Feedback / Grievance
registerFeedback.description: Submit feedback or register a grievance

step1.title: Submit Your Documents
step1.description: Upload your identity documents and required verification details through the secure portal.

step2.title: Automated Verification
step2.description: The system performs document checks and identity validation using official verification mechanisms.

step3.title: Application Review
step3.description: Consistency and application data are reviewed across submitted information and records.

step4.title: Verification Complete
step4.description: Receive your verification status along with applicable compliance information.

dataProtection.title: Data Protection
dataProtection.description: All information is protected using secure transmission and storage practices.

secureSystems.title: Secure Systems
secureSystems.description: Multi-layer safeguards are in place to prevent misuse and unauthorized access.

compliance.title: Regulatory Compliance
compliance.description: Processes are aligned with applicable KYC and data-handling guidelines.

services.title: Know About Our Services
services.subtitle: A comprehensive identity verification framework designed to support secure and compliant KYC processes.

documentVerification.title: Document Verification
documentVerification.description: Verification of submitted documents through structured checks and cross-reference mechanisms.

biometricVerification.title: Biometric Verification
biometricVerification.description: Identity verification using facial, voice, or fingerprint-based signals where applicable.

consistencyReview.title: Application Consistency Review
consistencyReview.description: Review of application data to identify inconsistencies or unusual patterns.

fraudAssessment.title: Fraud Risk Assessment
fraudAssessment.description: Detection of high-risk identity submissions through layered verification safeguards.

footer.ministryFull: Government of India | Ministry of Identity Verification

auth.passwordMinLength: Password must be at least 6 characters

forgotPassword.title: Forgot Password
forgotPassword.description: Enter your email address and we'll send you a link to reset your password.
forgotPassword.successMessage: If an account exists with this email, you will receive password reset instructions.
